simple_responses.fever: For mild fever, rest and drink fluids. Take paracetamol if needed. See doctor if >3 days or >103°F.
simple_responses.cold: Rest, fluids, and OTC medications. Usually resolves in 7-10 days. See doctor if symptoms worsen.
simple_responses.headache: Rest in dark room, hydrate, take paracetamol. See doctor if severe or persistent >3 days.
